content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (post iter-018)

## HIGH ‚Äî blueprint adequacy gate BEFORE the next S3-bridge prove lane
`lem:carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf` (RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex L2204‚Äì2263) proves only
the **affine** `U = Spec A` case, but the Lean `carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf` is stated
and consumed (`NatIso.ofComponents`) for **all opens**. The prove lane that closes S3 needs the
general-`U` ‚Üí affine-cover **locality/gluing** step, which the chapter does not sketch.
‚Üí Dispatch **blueprint-writer** on RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex to: (a) add the general-`U` reduction
(carrier order-conditions are local; `Œì(U,ùí™_C)` = ‚à© over an affine cover; cite `carrierSet_mono`);
(b) state the component iso explicitly as the **identity-on-`K(C)`** map (the naturality square depends
on this). This is the HARD GATE for the S3 lane ‚Äî do NOT send a prover at L1800/L1819 until the chapter
covers all-`U`. (lean-vs-blueprint-checker/ocofd, major.)

## HIGH ‚Äî next prove target: the S3 inverse (Hartogs / Dedekind-per-chart)
Closest deep gap to closure. Recipe (from task_result + checker):
1. Build `IsDedekindDomain Œì(C.left, U)` for an affine open: project `SmoothRegular` (smooth ‚üπ regular)
   ‚üπ integrally-closed Noetherian dim-1 ‚üπ Dedekind. NO single-call Mathlib lemma ‚Äî likely Mathlib-build.
   The P¬π PID route (`WeilDivisor` L1811, `HomogeneousLocalization.Away`) does NOT generalise.
2. Discharge the inverse via `IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.mem_integers_of_valuation_le_one`
   (already `\mathlibok`) over `functionField_isFractionRing_of_isAffineOpen`.
3. Naturality square (L1819) then closes mechanically (identity on `K(C)` both sides).
‚Üí Consider an **effort-breaker** on `carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf` once the blueprint
covers all-`U`, splitting the Dedekind-instance build from the `mem_integers` application.

## MEDIUM ‚Äî G2 residue cluster (independent of the bridge)
`cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar` (L1509) ‚Äî the DVR residue quotient `(œÄ^{-(n+1)}ùí™)/(œÄ^{-n}ùí™) ‚âÖ kÃÑ`.
iter-017 reduced it to this single sorry; untouched iter-018. Separate cluster from the bridge ‚Äî can be
dispatched in parallel (different decl, same file ‚áí sequential prover round). iter-017 review recommended
effort-breaking into (a) stalk-map naturality + (b) DVR residue before proving.

## MEDIUM ‚Äî coverage debt (restore tex; planner authors prose, not the review agent)
- `sheafOf.carrierSet_zero_eq` (OcOfD.lean:1730) ‚Äî no `\lean{}`. Depends on `carrierSet`; realises the
  first sentence of `lem:carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf`.
- `sheafOf.structureSection_mem_carrierSet_zero` (OcOfD.lean:1748) ‚Äî no `\lean{}`. Closed reusable forward
  inclusion `Œì(U,ùí™_C) ‚Üí carrier‚ÇÄ` (germ/ordFrac). Worth its OWN pinned blueprint block (checker rec).

## LOW ‚Äî module-header + docstring cleanup (comment-only; route to planner/writer)
lean-auditor/iter018 flagged 7 stale comments (no Lean impact, but actively misleading):
- L63‚Äì71 module-header "Status" under-reports active sorries (says 2, actually 6) and falsely classifies
  `sheafOf`/`sheafOf_zero` as "Tier-3 honest typed sorry" ‚Äî both are now sorry-free (closed iter-011/014/016).
- Stale iter numbers `iter-181/183/184/185/186` (pre-3-digit-reset) in docstrings at L606, L625, L660, L692, L1868.
- L1629 "SOLE remaining deep ingredient" ‚Äî now one of several (alongside the S3 bridge).
The plan agent owns blueprint/docstring prose; provers own `.lean` bodies. Flag for a cleanup pass.

## Do NOT re-attempt
- The whole cokernel iso blind (sorry 0‚Üí2‚Üí4 regression, iter pre-015). It is decomposed; only the two
  leaf clusters (S3 bridge gap + G2 residue) remain.
- The P¬π PID route for the Dedekind-per-chart instance ‚Äî does not generalise to arbitrary smooth curves.
